settings_highlight_desc: Choose how to highlight text on the web page.
settings_reset_confirm: Are you sure? Labels and highlight settings will be reset to default.
clear_all_confirm: Are you sure? This will remove all subjects from the list.
csv_no_data_alert: CSV file contains no valid data!
qr_data_too_large: Data is too large to generate QR code
notif_clear_confirm: Are you sure you want to clear all notifications?
guidance_desc: Some results were not found on the current page. Content may not be loaded yet.
guidance_tip1: Switch to the correct section/tab on the web page
guidance_tip2: Wait for the page to finish loading, then scan again
guidance_tip3: Try Deep Scan to find content hidden by the interface
onboarding_step1_desc: This tool helps you search & highlight courses on VNU's registration page quickly. No more manual Ctrl+F!
onboarding_step2_desc:
Fill in the fields: Course Name, Class Code, Day, Shift, Room. Each field is a search criterion.
• Use comma (,) to search multiple values in one field
• Example: type "Mon, Wed" in the Day field to find both
• Click the ＋ Add button to create more courses
onboarding_step3_desc:
After entering info, click the 🔍 button or press Enter to highlight courses on the web page.
• Deep Search supports hidden elements (with 🔍 Hidden badge)
• A result badge will appear (e.g., 1/3)
• Use ▲ ▼ buttons to jump between results
• Click ⭐ to make highlights blink for easy spotting
• Choose different highlight colors for each course
onboarding_step4_desc:
Click "⚡ Scan All" to highlight ALL courses in your list on the web page with just 1 click!
• Shortcut: Ctrl + Shift + S
• Each course gets its own unique color
• Result counts update for each course
onboarding_step5_desc:
Drag the ⠿ icon to reorder courses as you like.
• Toggle individual courses on/off with the switch
• Use Toggle All to enable/disable everything
• Assign priority tags: Required, Optional, Backup
• Click 📋 to quickly duplicate a course
• Filter your list with the search box above
onboarding_step6_desc:
Manage your course list easily:
• Download CSV template → fill in → Upload CSV
• Export CSV to save or share with friends
• QR Share: generate a QR code for friends to scan
• Import from code: paste a share code to import
onboarding_step7_desc:
Click the 📌 Float button to pop out a floating window.
• View the registration page and search at the same time
• Drag the header to move the window
• Drag edges to resize
• Click 📌 Pin to keep window open when clicking outside
onboarding_step8_desc:
Click the ⚙️ Settings button to:
• Rename search field labels
• Add custom search fields
• Choose highlight style: background, wavy underline, solid, bold
• Adjust highlight opacity
• Preview highlight style before saving
onboarding_step9_desc:
Keyboard shortcuts for faster workflow:
• Ctrl + Shift + F — Open extension
• Ctrl + Shift + S — Scan all
• Ctrl + Shift + A — Add new course
• Ctrl + ↑↓ — Jump between results (on web page)
• Enter — Quick search from active field
• ESC — Close modal / settings
onboarding_step11_desc:
Additional features to enhance your experience:
• 🔔 Notifications: View scan history and statuses
• 🌐 Language: Easily switch between English and Vietnamese
• 🔥 Streak: Track your consecutive days of using the tool
• 🐱 Meme Mode: Fun easter eggs to relieve registration stress
onboarding_step10_desc:
You've learned all the features!

Open VNU's registration page → enter your course list → click Scan All. Good luck with registration! 💜
